parameters.content:
## WF-EMAIL-04 — Daily Email Stats

Runs Mon-Fri at 6PM CST.
Pulls all contacts tagged email-sequence-cold.
Calculates: interested, not interested, complete, queued, unsub.
Posts daily report to Telegram topic:9 (ACS).

⚠️ SETUP:
1. Wire GHL API credential
2. Replace YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID_ACS
3. Add TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN to N8N env vars
